name: air-drow
description: AIR-DROW Mobile Safety & Final QA Edition — trusted physical-action export gates, source-authoritative rendering, quiet hand guidance and Android-focused release checks.

scripts.verify:source: npm run icons:sync && npm run icons:verify && npm run icons:local:verify && npm run preflight && npm run check && npm run model:verify && npm run release:verify && npm run production:verify && npm run localization:verify && npm run runtime:verify && npm run qa:reality && npm run qa:critical-input-export && npm test
scripts.verify:deploy-output: npm run hand-loader:verify && npm run deploy-build:verify
scripts.build: npm run verify:source && npm run build:static && npm run verify:deploy-output
scripts.vercel:build: npm run model:verify && npm run build
scripts.qa:critical-input-export: npm run qa:input-export-safety && npm run qa:mobile-final
